title: Oil Spike Challenges Dry Bulk Fuel Equation
section_path: Oil Spike Challenges Dry Bulk Fuel Equation
section_path_text: Oil Spike Challenges Dry Bulk Fuel Equation
summary:
Main
The Middle Eastern Conflict has triggered wild swings in oil and marine fuel prices. Following the outbreak of the conflict, and reflecting the closure of the Strait of Hormuz through which around 20-21 mb/d of crude and refined products pass, oil prices have been on a roller-coaster ride and by the time of writing, prompt month ICE Brent was standing at over $100/bbl. Indeed, considering the scale of the disruption to oil flows, prices are increasingly volatile and reacting to newsflow.
